description: Course title only — skill should ask clarifying questions via AskQuestion
input: Build a curriculum for 'Data Structures and Algorithms'
expected_behavior: Skill invokes AskQuestion to collect target audience, week count, learning objectives, and source materials
Does NOT proceed to Phase 2 without at least target audience and one source
Suggests reasonable defaults (12 weeks, bilingual, default artifact set)
success_criteria: AskQuestion is called before any notebook_create or file generation

description: Full input with title + objectives + sources + 12 weeks — generates complete curriculum
input: Build a 12-week curriculum for 'Introduction to Natural Language Processing' targeting graduate students. Sources: ~/papers/attention-is-all-you-need.pdf, https://web.stanford.edu/~jurafsky/slp3/. Objectives: (1) Explain core NLP pipeline components, (2) Implement text classification and sequence labeling, (3) Evaluate transformer-based models for downstream tasks. Generate slides, quiz, flashcards, and study guide per module.
expected_behavior: Phase 1: Saves phase1-input.json with all collected parameters
Phase 2: Generates authority-map.md with 12 modules, subtopics, key questions, and Bloom's progression
Phase 3: Creates NLM notebook, sets persona via chat_configure, uploads 1 PDF + 1 URL
Phase 4: Generates syllabus.md following syllabus-template.md structure, saves syllabus.docx
Phase 5: Generates 12 lesson-plan.md files following lesson-plan-template.md structure
Phase 6: Generates 4 artifact types × 12 modules = 48 artifacts
Phase 7: Creates manifest.json, curriculum-overview.docx
success_criteria: All 7 phases complete; outputs/curriculum/introduction-to-natural-language-processing/ contains authority-map.md, syllabus.md, syllabus.docx, manifest.json, and 12 module-NN/ directories each with lesson-plan.md + 4 artifacts

description: Verify EN+KO bilingual generation for syllabus and lesson plans
input: Build a 4-week curriculum for 'Cloud Computing Fundamentals' with bilingual output. Source: https://cloud.google.com/docs/overview
expected_behavior: Syllabus contains English section followed by --- divider followed by Korean section
Each lesson plan contains parallel EN and KO versions with identical structure
Korean learning objectives use 합니다체 and parenthetical English terms on first use
Both versions contain the same number of modules, objectives, and source citations
success_criteria: syllabus.md and all lesson-plan.md files contain both EN and KO sections separated by --- with matching structure

description: Mix of PDF, URL, YouTube, and Google Doc sources — all ingested correctly
input: Build curriculum for 'AI Ethics'. Sources: ~/docs/ai-ethics-report.pdf, https://arxiv.org/abs/2301.10226, https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ, https://docs.google.com/document/d/1abc123
expected_behavior: source_add called with source_type='file' for PDF
source_add called with source_type='url' for arXiv URL
source_add called with source_type='url' for YouTube URL (NLM auto-extracts transcript)
source_add called with source_type='drive' for Google Docs URL with document_id extracted
All 4 sources appear in phase3-sources.json
wait=True used for each source_add call
success_criteria: phase3-sources.json lists 4 sources with correct types; notebook_query succeeds referencing content from all sources

description: Resume from interrupted pipeline — skip completed phases
input: Resume the 'Introduction to NLP' curriculum build with --resume
expected_behavior: Checks manifest.json for completed phases
Skips Phase 1-4 if syllabus.md and authority-map.md already exist
Resumes from the first incomplete module in Phase 5 or Phase 6
Does not overwrite existing artifacts
Updates manifest.json with newly completed items
success_criteria: Only incomplete phases/modules are processed; existing files remain unchanged; manifest.json updated
